Korlix — Build the Future
Ultra-light frontend language with zero boilerplate.
K
Korlix
FeaturesShowcaseStatsPricing
Phase 1 · Now Available

Build websites
10x faster.

Korlix is a frontend language that compiles .klx files into blazing-fast HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. No boilerplate. No config. Just code.

src/pages/index.klx
page welcome route "/":
  state count: int = 0

  section .hero .center .bg-dark:
    h1 .text-6xl .font-black .text-primary "Hello Korlix"
    btn .primary "Click me" on:click:
      count = count + 1
      toast success "Clicked " + count
FEATURES

Everything built-in

No plugins. No configuration. Zero boilerplate.

⚡

Compile-time first

AST-based Rust compiler. Every feature validated before output. Zero runtime surprises.

LexerParserAST
🎨

JIT CSS Engine

1000+ utility classes, 17 color palettes, variants. Only ships what you actually use.

JITVariantsDark mode
🧩

100+ Components

Button, modal, toast, avatar, pagination, forms — all compile-time expanded to pure HTML.

ModalToastForms
🔀

SPA Router

Built-in client-side routing with params, active links, and route manifest. Zero config.

ParamsHistory
♻️

Hot Drop

CSS updates without page reload. State preserved. Error overlay in browser. Real-time feedback.

WebSocketHMR
🔒

Safe by default

Automatic HTML escaping, accessibility checks, and SEO validation — all at compile time.

XSS safeA11ySEO
SHOWCASE

See it in action

Real Korlix code. Real output.

counter.klx
Korlix source
# Interactive counter component
page counter route "/counter":

  state count: int = 0
  state theme: string = "violet"

  section .min-h-screen .center .bg-[#0a0819]:
    h1 .text-8xl .font-black .text-[#7c3aed] count
    p .text-[#64748b] "clicks"

    div .flex .gap-4 .mt-8:
      btn .primary .text-xl .px-10 .py-4 "+" on:click:
        count = count + 1
        toast success "Count: " + count
      btn .danger .text-xl .px-10 .py-4 "Reset" on:click:
        count = 0
